commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=338d7f4731f0cb220b6a1c2bcbb1d48fdc0da3e6)
commands.review_summary:
The branch forces Gemma models in the Google plugin toward the native `google-generative-ai` transport and adds a regression test for explicit Gemma provider config normalization.

PR surface: Source +18, Tests +28. Total +46 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. The PR discussion gives endpoint-failure context and after-fix live output, and source inspection shows the current explicit-config and PR-head routing paths without needing a live Google key in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The PR should stay open for author or maintainer repair because the branch is dirty and the remaining provider-routing blockers are compatibility-sensitive.

target.title: fix(google): route Gemma models through native Generative AI API
target.author: tanjinlimkelvin-dot

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
